description_long: This is a rectangular, gable-top carton bottle, commonly used for milk or juice, with a predominantly green and cream color scheme. The front face displays the word 'MINI' in large white letters, along with additional text and a circular logo featuring a building illustration. The carton has a folded, sealed top with a small tab, and the sides are covered with nutritional information, certifications, and branding details. The surface appears to be made of coated paperboard, giving it a matte, slightly textured finish. The bottom of the carton is flat, allowing it to stand upright, and the overall size suggests it is a small, single-serving container. There are no visible signs of damage or deformation, and the cap is integrated into the folded top rather than being a separate plastic piece.
description: A small, rectangular gable-top carton bottle with green and cream colors, detailed branding, and a folded paperboard top. The surface is matte and slightly textured, with visible text and logos.
description_view_0: The carton is seen from an angled top-front view, showing the folded gable top, the main logo, and part of the front and right side with visible text and graphics.
description_view_1: This left-side view highlights the nutritional information, recycling symbols, and a portion of the front label, with the gable top and tab visible.
description_view_2: A direct front view displays the 'MINI' branding, main logo, and most of the front-facing text, with the cream-to-green gradient clearly visible.
description_view_3: The right-side view shows detailed text, certification logos, and the side panel, with the gable top and tab also visible.
attribute_label_or_branding: The front displays 'MINI' in large white letters, a circular logo with a building illustration, and additional text in white. Side panels include nutritional information, recycling symbols, and certification logos in black and white. The branding is clear and prominent, with a green-to-cream gradient background.
